parameters.query: =UPDATE generation_feedback SET embedding = '[{{ $json.embedding.join(',') }}]'::vector(768) WHERE id = '{{ $json.feedback_id }}' RETURNING id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, feedback_id: $('Extraer y validar embedding').first().json.feedback_id, dimensions: $('Extraer y validar embedding').first().json.dimensions } }}
